entries.name: region-reconcile-defaults
entries.purpose: Daily 03:15 UTC. Verifies every tenant has exactly one is_default=true Region. Reports drift + optionally auto-heals per `region.reconciliation.auto_heal` config. Feeds the `academorix.region.default_invariant_drift.count` gauge.

entries.name: region-purge-archived
entries.purpose: Daily 04:15 UTC. Hard-delete Region rows past their 730-day retention window IF no inbound FK still references them.

entries.name: region-auto-resume-paused
entries.purpose: Every 15 minutes. Find Regions with status=paused AND expected_resume_at <= now(); transition to status=active + fire RegionResumed.

entries.name: region-metrics-snapshot
entries.purpose: Hourly. Compute `academorix.region.active.count` per (status, country_code) + `academorix.region.per_tenant.count` histogram + `academorix.region.purge_pending.count`. Publishes to the OpenTelemetry endpoint.

entries.name: region-cache-warm-country-defaults
entries.purpose: Daily 05:00 UTC. Re-parses `data/country-defaults.json` + writes `rgn:country_defaults` + `rgn:country_default:{code}` per-country. Cheap idempotent task — mostly a safety net in case the file changed between deploys.
